runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 390m at Ballarat in a handy (22.63), beating Dream Lucky. Solid chance with even luck.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (24.05) when eighth over 410m at Horsham in a Restricted WIN. Starts from box 2 for the first time here. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

runners.formComment: Working his way into winning form after claiming his maiden success on March 12 at this track over 390m. Last start was second over 410m in 23.75, behind Pouring Chandon. Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

runners.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Ballarat over 390m. Others hold stronger claims.

runners.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (22.31) at this track over 390m. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 12 length fifth (24.94) at Bendigo. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Needs to find best and prepared to watch this time.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 4.5 lengths in 22.69, beating Paw Georgie. Last start finished last over 485m at Horsham beaten 13 lengths (28.32) behind Paw Bennett in a Mix 6/7 on March 31. This looks too tough.

runners.formComment: Backs up quickly after winning by a nose at this track (22.72) beating Rita Skeeter in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 13 three days ago. This is much harder assignment and he needs to find another gear.
